user.title: Connect to Ridder HortOS
user.description: Enter the API key for the Ridder HortOS Automation API. You can request one from your Ridder account manager.

data_description.base_url: Use the default for the HortOS cloud API, or the address of the on-premise API on your local network.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Ridder HortOS
reauth_confirm.description: The API key was rejected. Enter a valid API key.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the HortOS API
error.no_devices: Authentication succeeded but no devices are available for this API key

abort.already_configured: This HortOS organisation is already configured

data_description.source_types: Sensors are only created for the selected source types; deselected types are removed. Selecting all (or none) includes everything.
